achievements.title: Ya Dun Goofed!
achievements.description: Give us your name, not his!
achievements.author: authorblues

achievements.title: Checking My ID
achievements.description: How did Goofy know my *real* name?
achievements.author: authorblues

achievements.title: Silver Mic-keys: Pirates of the Caribbean
achievements.description: Rescue six maidens and light the signal fire for a silver key

achievements.title: Silver Mic-keys: The Haunted Mansion
achievements.description: Carry a light to the end of the mansion where the Master Spectre is guarding a silver key

achievements.title: Silver Mic-keys: Big Thunder Mountain Railroad
achievements.description: Guide your train to the correct station where Goofy is waiting to hand over a silver key
achievements.author: authorblues

achievements.title: Silver Mic-keys: Autopia
achievements.description: Beat Panhandle Pete in the big race to earn one of Mickey's silver keys

achievements.title: Silver Mic-keys: Space Mountain
achievements.description: Safely navigate the wormhole to reach Star F and collect a silver key
achievements.author: authorblues

achievements.title: Silver Mic-keys: Trivia Master
achievements.description: Earn a silver key by answering Disney trivia questions around the park

achievements.title: Time to Party
achievements.description: Collect all six silver keys and start the big parade!

achievements.title: It's a Small World
achievements.description: This ride is closed for maintenance. Sorry for the inconvenience!

achievements.title: In a Rush
achievements.description: Become number 1000 within 1 second

achievements.description: Leave the second floor of the Haunted Mansion with 60 or more candles

achievements.title: An Actual Fire Hazard
achievements.description: Collect 79 or more candles before reaching the boss of the Haunted Mansion
achievements.author: authorblues

achievements.title: Meet Jack Sparrow
achievements.description: Collect the candle in Pirates of the Caribbean
achievements.author: authorblues

achievements.title: Sailing With the Wind
achievements.description: Complete Pirates of the Caribbean with 85 or more seconds left on the clock

achievements.title: A Damsel in Distress
achievements.description: Rescue a maiden in Pirates of the Caribbean while under the effect of invincibility

achievements.title: Pressing Pause
achievements.description: Stop the dancers by freezing time three or more times on the second floor of the Haunted Mansion

achievements.title: Full Steam Ahead
achievements.description: Reach the correct station within 45 seconds without getting hit

achievements.title: Gold Cup on the Disney 500
achievements.description: Complete the race with 15 or more seconds left

achievements.title: Autopia Superstar
achievements.description: Collect 35 or more stars in one race on Autopia

achievements.title: To Boldly Go Where No Mouse Has Gone Before
achievements.description: Reach Star F without getting hit

achievements.title: When You Wish Upon a Star
achievements.description: Collect and hold 99 stars

achievements.title: You Know There Are Unlimited Continues, Right?
